title: Trondheim Heavy Rain
lead: Trondheim is experiencing heavy rain with a Z-Score of -3.69, indicating a significant anomaly. The Score of 10.0/10 and CRITICAL Level suggest extreme weather conditions.
body:
The heavy rain in Trondheim is causing disruptions to daily life. 
 The high humidity of 89% and moderate wind speed of 18.0 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The HDD value of 13.9 GG and CDD value of 0.0 GG indicate a significant impact on heating demands.
conclusion: Implement emergency protocols to ensure public safety and minimize damage.
